sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77184" key="pana/grios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-άγριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77184.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quite wild</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">savage</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.45</biblScope></bibl>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:202" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">202</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
